zh.lifeSummary: 當Rosa Cathryn Cartright於1872年7月23日出生在美國阿肯色州時，她的父親James M. Cartwright28歲，母親Alice C. Irene Tresenriter22歲。她於1891年7月12日與David Phipps Griffith在美國阿肯色州蘭多夫結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和7個女兒的父母。她於1910年住在美國德州丹頓嘉絲蒂 普雷可特 2且在美國阿肯色州波爾克懷特 堂史普住了大約20年。她去世於1944年3月28日在美國奧克拉荷馬州布萊恩武迪卡享年71歲，埋葬在美國阿肯色州波爾克比 福可普利桑特 葛洛夫 其特利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Rosa Cathryn Cartright于1872年7月23日出生在美国阿肯色州时，她的父亲James M. Cartwright28岁，母亲Alice C. Irene Tresenriter22岁。她于1891年7月12日与David Phipps Griffith在美国阿肯色州蘭多夫结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和7个女儿的父母。她于1910年住在美国德州丹頓嘉絲蒂 普雷可特 2且在美国阿肯色州波爾克懷特 堂史普住了大约20年。她去世于1944年3月28日在美国奥克拉荷马州布萊恩武迪卡享年71岁，埋葬在美国阿肯色州波爾克比 福可普利桑特 葛洛夫 其特利。

variants.name: Cartwright
meanings: English (Midlands and northern England): occupational name from Middle English cart(e) ‘cart’ + wright(e) ‘craftsman’ (Old English cræt or Old Norse kartr + Old English wyrhta), for a cartwright, a maker of carts.
Variant of   Courtright  , a surname of Dutch origin.

historicEvents.description: Historical Boundaries - 1873: Clayton, Arkansas, United States; 1876: *Clay, Arkansas, United States. [*Renamed to Clay from Clayton]

historicEvents.title: A Treaty with Hawaii
historicEvents.description: In the Mid 1870s, The United States sought out the Kingdom of Hawaii to make a free trade agreement. The Treaty gave the Hawaiians access to the United States agricultural markets and it gave the United States a part of land which later became Pearl Harbor.

historicEvents.title: Texas Files Lawsuit Against Standard Oil Company
historicEvents.description: Under the direction of Governor Jim Hogg, Texas filed a lawsuit against John D. Rockefeller for violating state monopoly laws. Hogg argued that Standard Oil Company and Water-Piece Oil Company of Missouri were engaged in illegal practices like price fixing, rebates, and consolidation. Rockefeller was indicted, but never tried in a court of law; other employees of his company were convicted as guilty.

historicEvents.title: Plessy vs. Ferguson
historicEvents.description: A landmark decision of the U.S. Supreme Court upholding the constitutionality of racial segregation laws for public facilities if the segregated facilities were equal in quality. It's widely regarded as one of the worst decisions in U.S. Supreme Court history.

historicEvents.title: The NAACP is formed
historicEvents.description: Organized as a civil rights organization, The National Association for the Advancement of Colored People is a bi-racial endeavor to advance justice for African Americans. It is one of the oldest civil rights organizations in the nation.
historicEvents.urlTitle: The National Association for the Advancement of Colored People

historicEvents.title: State Capital Moves to Oklahoma City
historicEvents.description: The state capital of Oklahoma moved from Guthrie to Oklahoma City on June 10, 1910.
Charles Lindbergh makes the first solo nonstop transatlantic flight in his plane The Spirit of St. Louis.

historicEvents.title: The Great Depression Arrives
historicEvents.description: Like most of the country, the economy of Texas suffered greatly after the Stock Market Crash of 1929. Thousands of city workers were suddenly unemployed and relied on a variety of government relief programs; unemployed Mexican citizens were required to take one-way bus tickets to Mexico.

en.lifeSummary: When Rosa Cathryn Cartright was born on 23 July 1872, in Arkansas, United States, her father, James M. Cartwright, was 28 and her mother, Alice C. Irene Tresenriter, was 22. She married David Phipps Griffith on 12 July 1891, in Randolph, Arkansas, United States. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 7 daughters. She lived in Justice Precinct 2, Denton, Texas, United States in 1910 and White Township, Polk, Arkansas, United States for about 20 years. She died on 28 March 1944, in Utica, Bryan, Oklahoma, United States, at the age of 71, and was buried in Pleasant Grove Cemetery, Big Fork, Polk, Arkansas, United States.

ja.lifeSummary: Rosa Cathryn Cartrightが1872年7月23日にアメリカ合衆国アーカンソー州で生まれた時，父James M. Cartwrightは28歳，母Alice C. Irene Tresenriterは22歳であった。1891年7月12日にアメリカ合衆国アーカンソー州ランドルフでDavid Phipps Griffithと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と7人の娘の親であった。彼女は1910年にはアメリカ合衆国テキサス州デントンジャスティス プレシンクト 2に，アメリカ合衆国アーカンソー州ポルクウィト トウンシュイップに約20年間住んでいた。彼女は1944年3月28日にアメリカ合衆国オクラホマ州ブリアンウティカで71歳で死去し，アメリカ合衆国アーカンソー州ポルクビグ フォークプレアサント グローブ セメテリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Rosa Cathryn Cartright(이)가 1872년 7월 23일 미국 아칸소 주에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 James M. Cartwright(은)는 28세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alice C. Irene Tresenriter(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 1891년 7월 12일 미국 아칸소 주 랜돌프에서 David Phipps Griffith(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 1910년도에 미국 텍사스 주 덴턴 저스티스 프레신크트 2에서, 미국 아칸소 주 폴크 휘트 타운시프에서 약 20년 동안 살았다. 그녀는 1944년 3월 28일 미국 오클라호마 주 브라이언 우티카에서 71세의 나이로 사망했으며 미국 아칸소 주 폴크 비그 포크 플리산트 그로브 세멧리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Rosa Cathryn Cartright nasceu em 23 de julho de 1872, em Arcansas, Estados Unidos da América, seu pai, James M. Cartwright, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Alice C. Irene Tresenriter, tinha 22 anos. Ela casou-se com David Phipps Griffith em 12 de julho de 1891, em Randolph, Arcansas, Estados Unidos da América. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 7 filhas. Ela viveu em Justice Precinct 2, Denton, Texas, Estados Unidos da América em 1910 e em White Township, Polk, Arcansas, Estados Unidos da América por quase 20 anos. Ela faleceu em 28 de março de 1944, em Utica, Bryan, Oclaoma, Estados Unidos da América, com 71 anos, e foi sepultada em Pleasant Grove Cemetery, Big Fork, Polk, Arcansas, Estados Unidos da América.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Rosa Cathryn Cartright родилась 23 июля 1872 г. в местности Арканзас, Соединенные штаты, её отцу по имени James M. Cartwright было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice C. Irene Tresenriter, 22. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени David Phipps Griffith 12 июля 1891 г. в местности рандолф, Арканзас, Соединенные штаты. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 7 дочерей. Она жила в местности джюстаис пресинкт 2, дентон, Техас, Соединенные штаты в 1910 году и в местности уит тоуншип, полк, Арканзас, Соединенные штаты около 20 лет. Она умерла 28 марта 1944 г. в местности утика, брян, Оклахома, Соединенные штаты в возрасте 71 год и была похоронена в местности плисант гров кеметири, биг форк, полк, Арканзас, Соединенные штаты.
